title: Creator Toolkit
description: A Toolkit of mods primarily focused on Creators but with QoL for anyone.
body:
## The All in One Kit for Minecraft
An **Optimized** modpack made for **QoL** with the ability to aid content creation

Typical performance **3-4 times faster than vanilla**

**Note:** if a bar apears at the top of the screen in menus **click CTRL + ALT + C to hide it.**

## A list of of key mods is as follows:
- Flashback (record and replay gameplay but better than Replay mod)
- Axiom (The ultimate tool for builders, use right shift to open menu, only for worlds with cheats)
- Freecam (Let's you fly around freely, use with descretion)
- Litematica (Make and use blueprints for builds)
- ViaFabricPlus (Let's you connect to every version a server is on)
- e4mc (Makes Lan worlds also give a link that lets anyone connect)
- Zoomify (Adds a zoom like the spyglass)
- Capes (Let's you use capes from any mod that has one)
- Gamma Utils (Pretty much fullbright)
- Inventory Profiles Next (Auto replace tools, sort inventories and much more)
- Jade (Find out what you're looking at)
- Sounds + Sound Phyisics Remasted (Greatly Enchances the Minecraft audio experiance)
- Isometrics (Make an isometric render of an area)

![Me standing on the edge of a cliff with a camera orbiting me, made with this modpack](https://i.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbHhyd210cG5mbWx6NXg1NzhvdzR3OHV1NDJyZ2I1bXB0MDlveWd5ZiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0yAuXkqvRQlv3FmkM6/giphy.gif)

Feel free to DM on Discord and ask questions or ask for help, really anything.
